textPlain: The qwen thinker/speaker architecture is really fascinating and  is more in line with how I imagine human multi modality works - IE, a picture of an apple, the text a p p l e and the sound all map to the same concept without going to text first.

Here is the demo video on it. The video w/ sound input -> sound output while doing translation from the video to another language was the most impressive display I've seen yet.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_zdOrPju4_g
